mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS spotId, s.name AS spotName, s.region, mf.forecast_date AS forecastDate, s.post_count AS postCount, JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'forecastId', mf.id, 'timeSlot', mf.time_slot, 'totalIndex', mf.total_index, 'weather', mf.weather, 'tide', mf.tide, 'metrics', mf.metrics ) ) AS forecasts FROM spots s JOIN marine_forecasts mf ON mf.spot_id = s.id AND mf.forecast_date = #{forecastDate} WHERE s.active = 1 AND s.experience = #{experience} GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.region, mf.forecast_date, s.post_count ORDER BY AVG( CASE mf.total_index WHEN '매우좋음' THEN 5 WHEN '좋음' THEN 4 WHEN '보통' THEN 3 WHEN '나쁨' THEN 2 WHEN '매우나쁨' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) DESC, s.post_count DESC, s.name ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_spot_recommendations ( experience, forecast_date, spot_id, rank_no, reason, generated_at ) VALUES
( #{recommendation.experience}, #{recommendation.forecastDate}, #{recommendation.spotId}, #{recommendation.rank}, #{recommendation.reason}, #{recommendation.generatedAt} )
